name: Revolution Private Credit Income Trust
analysis: REV has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.9830. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.9782 where 6 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.9830, stop A$1.9355, target A$2.0000. Risk/reward is 0.36:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
